channel.title: Posts on TRISPECTIVE
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on TRISPECTIVE

item.title: Launching the TRISPECTIVE 3 New Free Tools options
item.description: I am excited to announce a massive new upgrade to TRISPECTIVE: the Tools. I have custom-built a suite of interactive, zero-lag web applications designed specifically to streamline civil services preparation, analyze complex datasets, and sharpen cognitive speed. These tools are 100% free for everyone to use. Here is a quick look at the first three utilities now live on the site: 1. PYQ Scanner - (main update) A high-performance database interface built to instantly filter and analyze Previous Year Questions.

item.title: Debunking the Myth: A Rational Analysis of Meat Consumption in Hinduism
item.description: Note For this first/trial article, AI was used heavily to polish the translation and structure. That said, the core knowledge is mine and represents a level of insight that AI simply cannot match. Recently, a massive controversy erupted on the internet when YouTuber Dhruv Rathee uploaded a video claiming that Hinduism inherently permits, and even encourages, meat consumption—including beef. Relying on a mix of cherry-picked verses, mistranslations by foreign authors, and AI-generated images, the video painted a heavily distorted picture of Sanatan Dharma.
